title: Supreme Court and High Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1976

sections.text: This Act may be cited as the Supreme Court and High Court (Number of Judges) Act.
There shall be nine judges of the Supreme Court, including the Chief Justice and the Deputy Chief Justice.
There shall be thirty puisne judges of the High Court. [As amended by Act No. 20 of 1977 , No. 21 of 1988 and No. 10 of 1997]
